metadata.name: New Module 2
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Hallowdale.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Hallowdale
towns.description: A seaside port battered by salt winds and rich with the smell of fish.

key_dungeons.name: Frozen Crypt
key_dungeons.description: Crumbling pillars mark the way into Frozen Crypt. Faint scratching echoes from deep within.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Frozen Crypt and claim the Iron Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.
